backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the e-commerce backend with product management, shopping cart, order history, and user profiles, using role-based access control (admin/user) and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that all 'Wow Momo' text references have been replaced with 'Welcome to Shop Central' in the frontend, specifically in ProductCatalog.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key details, serving as a reference for the current state of the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including sidebar, chart, and semantic UI colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Shop Central', mounting the app at the #root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (catalog, product detail, cart, checkout, order confirmation, admin create-product), wrapped in AuthGuard and ProfileSetup.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard that shows a loading spinner during initialization, a 'Welcome to Shop Central' login prompt for unauthenticated users, or renders children when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/CartBadge.tsx: Displays a red badge with the total cart item count overlaid on the cart icon, hidden when the cart is empty.
frontend/src/components/CartItem.tsx: Cart item row component showing product image, name, unit price, a quantity selector with increment/decrement, item total, and a remove button.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with the Shop Central logo, desktop and mobile nav links (Shop, Cart), an admin-only Add Product link, cart icon with badge, and login button.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallerySele: A grid-based image selector component that displays a fixed set of product images and highlights the currently selected one with a checkmark overlay.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout component that wraps pages with a Header, renders child routes via Outlet, and displays a footer with store location and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout, showing appropriate icons and loading state, and clears the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a product's image, name, description, price, stock, and delivery type in a card, with an add-to-cart button and out-of-stock overlay.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A modal overlay that prompts newly authenticated users without a profile to enter their name, then saves it via the user profile mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/QuantitySelector: A compact increment/decrement quantity control with configurable min/max bounds and disabled state, built using shadcn Button components.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: A debounced search input that updates the URL search parameter on the home route after 300ms of inactivity.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all cart operations—fetching the cart, adding/removing/updating items, checking out, and retrieving order history—each invalidating relevant query keys on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context with an AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context provider and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useProducts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching all products, fetching a single product, and creating a new product via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and saving the current caller's user profile via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserRole.ts: Provides a React Query hook to check whether the current caller has admin privileges via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Poppins fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout page that collects shipping form data, validates it, displays an order summary with cart items and total, and triggers the checkout mutation on submission.
frontend/src/pages/CreateProduct.tsx: Admin-only page with a form to create a new product, including validation, image selection, and access control based on the caller's admin status.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Order confirmation page that displays the latest order's ID, status, and total after a successful checkout, along with a store pickup location notice.
frontend/src/pages/ProductCatalog.tsx: Product catalog page featuring a hero banner, search input, category filter buttons, and a responsive grid of product cards fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: React page component that displays a single product's details (image, price, description, stock) fetched by ID from the URL, with quantity selection and add-to-cart functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ShoppingCart.tsx: React page component that renders the shopping cart, listing cart items with quantities and an order summary panel showing subtotal and a checkout button.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read, persist, and clear URL query parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors (oklch/hsl tokens), fonts (Inter, Poppins), animations, box shadows, and plugins for animate, typography, and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the 'Shop Central' e-commerce project, recording the active fix request to replace all 'Wow Momo' branding with 'Welcome to Shop Central' across the frontend.
